mapper.select: select sr.id, sr.role, sr.role_name, sr.create_time, sr.update_time from superagent.superagent_role sr inner join superagent.superagent_user_role sur on sr.id = sur.role_id inner join superagent.superagent_user su on sur.user_id = su.id where sr.is_deleted = 0 and su.is_deleted = 0 and sur.is_deleted = 0 and su.id = #{userId}
